scripts.sync:todo-assets: mkdir -p public/zk/todo && rm -rf public/zk/todo/keys public/zk/todo/zkir && cp -r contracts/managed/todo/keys public/zk/todo/ && cp -r contracts/managed/todo/zkir public/zk/todo/
scripts.sync:shielded-todo-assets: mkdir -p public/zk/shieldedTodo && rm -rf public/zk/shieldedTodo/keys public/zk/shieldedTodo/zkir && cp -r contracts/managed/shieldedTodo/keys public/zk/shieldedTodo/ && cp -r contracts/managed/shieldedTodo/zkir public/zk/shieldedTodo/
scripts.prepare:todo: npm run compact:todo && npm run compact:shielded-todo && npm run sync:todo-assets && npm run sync:shielded-todo-assets
scripts.predev: npm run sync:todo-assets && npm run sync:shielded-todo-assets
scripts.prebuild: npm run sync:todo-assets && npm run sync:shielded-todo-assets
